channel.title: Dynamic ARP Inspection on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Dynamic ARP Inspection on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Security Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Security" , "Access Control Lists" , "VPN" , "Layer 2 Security" , "Cisco Certification" , "Wireless Security" , "AAA" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master security fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn security concepts, device access control, VPNs, access control lists, Layer 2 security, AAA, and wireless security.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Network Hardening Techniques
item.category: "IT and Networking" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Administration" , "Information Security" , "Network Hardening" , "Network Infrastructure" , "Network Security" , "CompTIA Network Plus" , "IT Certifications" , "Online Courses"
item.description: Learn the essential techniques for network hardening, including securing SNMP, implementing Router Advertisement Guard, configuring port security, dynamic ARP inspection, control plane policing, and private VLANs.
